Fuertemente inspirado en Limbo e Inside, Little Nightmares cuenta la historia de otro niño perdido. Six es una pequeña niña hambrienta con un impermeable amarillo, atrapada dentro de un misterioso vehículo llamado el Maw. Los jugadores controlan los movimientos de Six, ayudándola a escapar del barco y de sus peligrosos habitantes, que han estado secuestrando y preparando niños para servir como banquete a los Invitados.

El esquema de control no incluye movimientos de combate, dejando al jugador indefenso ante cualquier amenaza. Heavily inspired by Limbo and Inside, Little Nightmares tells the story of another lost child. Six is a starving little girl in a yellow raincoat, trapped inside a mysterious vessel called the Maw. Players control Six's movements, helping her escape the ship and its dangerous inhabitants, who have been kidnapping and preparing children to serve as a feast for the Guests.

The control scheme includes no combat moves, leaving players defenseless against any threat. Six can run, crawl, climb, push, or pull, and in rare cases carry an object she can throw to stagger an enemy or solve a puzzle. Players can also carry a lit match at any time, encouraging exploration and the search for collectible statues.

Little Nightmares has three DLC levels that expand the game beyond Six's perspective, following the Runaway Kid — a young boy trying to catch up to Six and experiencing his own adventure through the Maw across the extra chapters: The Depths, The Hideaway, and The Residence.

Half-Life es el juego original de la serie. Revolucionario para su época, sigue la historia de Gordon Freeman, un científico silencioso de las instalaciones de investigación Black Mesa. Llegando tarde al trabajo y apurando su rutina, termina en la cámara de experimentos. El experimento sale terriblemente mal, abriendo un portal hacia una dimensión completamente distinta llamada Xen. El laboratorio y el resto de las instalaciones quedan destruidos, y criaturas desconocidas llamadas Vortigaunts aparecen por todas partes. Gordon debe luchar para llegar a la superficie y encontrar la manera de cerrar el portal.

Una de las características distintivas de Half-Life fue su narrativa mediante secuencias guionizadas integradas directamente en la jugabilidad. Sin depender de escenas cinemáticas, el juego contaba toda su historia a través de muertes guionizadas, diálogos y apariciones de personajes mientras la acción continuaba. Al no sacar nunca al jugador de la acción, la experiencia se sentía notablemente fluida en todo momento. A pesar de ser científico, Gordon demuestra ser un combatiente capaz, derrotando enemigos con rifles, granadas, escopetas y mucho más en su camino.

Half-Life is the original game in the series. Revolutionary for its time, it follows the story of Gordon Freeman, a silent scientist at the Black Mesa research facility. Arriving late to work and hurrying through his routine, he ends up in the experiment chamber. The experiment goes horribly wrong, opening a portal to a completely different dimension called Xen. The lab and the rest of the facility are destroyed, and unknown creatures called Vortigaunts now roam everywhere. Gordon must fight his way to the surface and find a way to close the portal.

One of Half-Life's defining features was storytelling through scripted sequences woven directly into gameplay. Without relying on cutscenes, the game told its full story through scripted deaths, dialogue, and character appearances happening as gameplay continued. By never pulling the player out of the action, the experience felt remarkably smooth throughout. Despite being a scientist, Gordon proves a capable fighter, taking down enemies with rifles, grenades, shotguns, and more along his path.

Following the release of Half-Life 2, many players felt that the absence of multiplayer left the experience incomplete. While the single-player campaign received widespread praise, the game's weapons and mechanics sparked curiosity among fans who remembered that the original Half-Life featured multiplayer from the beginning.

In response, Valve released Half-Life 2: Deathmatch, a standalone multiplayer-focused experience built around the core gameplay of Half-Life 2. It features Deathmatch and Team Deathmatch modes, where players compete to earn points by defeating opponents. Fast-paced action, instant respawns, and intense firefights define every match.

Jak 3 continúa la historia de Jak y Daxter después de los acontecimientos anteriores, trasladando la aventura a un enorme desierto lleno de peligros, secretos y nuevas facciones enfrentadas.

Outer Wilds es una aventura de exploración y misterio ambientada en un sistema solar atrapado en un ciclo temporal infinito. Como nuevo integrante de un pequeño programa espacial, el jugador debe viajar entre planetas en constante transformación para descubrir los secretos que ocultan.

Cada mundo cambia con el paso del tiempo, revelando nuevas rutas, peligros y oportunidades de investigación. Utilizando herramientas científicas y observando cuidadosamente el entorno, los jugadores podrán descifrar antiguas civilizaciones, investigar fenómenos cósmicos y descubrir la verdad detrás del bucle temporal.

Outer Wilds is an exploration and mystery adventure set within a solar system trapped in an endless time loop. As the newest member of a young space program, players travel between constantly evolving planets in search of answers hidden throughout the cosmos.

Every world changes over time, revealing new paths, dangers, and discoveries. Using scientific tools and careful observation, players can uncover ancient civilizations, investigate cosmic phenomena, and ultimately learn the truth behind the mysterious time loop.

Factorio coloca al jugador en un planeta desconocido donde un astronauta debe sobrevivir y construir una fábrica cada vez más compleja para producir los recursos necesarios para escapar. La automatización es el núcleo de la experiencia, permitiendo crear enormes cadenas de producción interconectadas.

A medida que la industria crece, también aumenta el impacto sobre el entorno y la hostilidad de los habitantes del planeta. Los jugadores deberán equilibrar la expansión tecnológica, la gestión eficiente de recursos y la construcción de defensas para proteger sus instalaciones.

Factorio places players on an unknown planet where a stranded astronaut must survive and construct an increasingly complex industrial network in order to gather resources and eventually leave the planet. Automation is at the heart of the experience, allowing players to build vast interconnected production systems.

As industry expands, so does its impact on the environment and the hostility of the planet's inhabitants. Players must balance technological progress, efficient resource management, and defensive structures to keep their factories running.

Spider-Man: Friend or Foe is an action-adventure inspired by the Spider-Man film trilogy, allowing players to battle famous villains such as Venom, Green Goblin, and Doctor Octopus.
